differential_diagnoses: Endogenous Cushing's syndrome secondary to adrenocortical carcinoma
next_steps: Empiric intravenous antimicrobial therapy for TB meningitis (RIPE therapy plus steroids) and fungal meningitis (Liposomal Amphotericin B and Flucytosine)
Perform CSF analysis including AFB smear/culture, fungal culture, Cryptococcal antigen, and cytology for malignant cells
Measure serum ACTH, morning cortisol, and 24-hour urinary free cortisol to confirm Cushing's syndrome
Review MRI compatibility of the specific VNS model and perform brain MRI with gadolinium if possible
Perform whole-body PET/CT scan to evaluate the adrenal lesion and detect potential occult malignancy
Monitor intracranial pressure and consider neurosurgical consultation for shunting if pressure remains elevated
